title: carlina fennica
intro: Carlina fennica, also known as the Pyrenean hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species native to the Pyrenees mountains. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been reported to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Carlina fennica can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but its use should be guided by a medical professional due to potential side effects.
